events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes Over Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported striking missile sites and command centers in Iran, while Iran claimed to have attacked US bases. This exchange follows attacks on cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions in the region.

events.title: US Strikes Iran After Attack on Cargo Ship
events.desc: Iran accused the US of violating their deal and stated it launched retaliatory attacks on targets linked to American forces. This action comes after the US conducted strikes in response to an attack on a cargo ship.

events.title: Trump Threatens Further Strikes on Iran, Declares MOU 'Over'
events.desc: US President Donald Trump threatened further strikes on Iran, stating that an initial ceasefire deal with the Islamic Republic was "over". This follows renewed attacks around the Strait of Hormuz, intensifying concerns about a broader conflict.

events.title: Israeli Airstrikes Kill Seven in Gaza
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes and gunfire resulted in the deaths of at least seven Palestinians, including two children, in the Gaza Strip. The Israeli military stated it struck militants but was unaware of civilian casualties.

events.title: Pakistan Military Reports 42 Killed in Balochistan Fighter Attacks
events.desc: The Pakistan military announced that 42 individuals were killed in fighter attacks in Balochistan, with a military spokesman vowing to pursue the perpetrators.

events.title: Bomb Blasts Injure 18 in Damascus During Macron's Visit
events.desc: Two bomb explosions in Damascus injured 18 people. The attacks occurred during a visit by French President Macron, although state television reported Macron was welcomed by the Syrian President.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes After Tankers Hit in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported striking missile sites and command centers while Iran claimed to have attacked US bases. This escalation follows attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz and accusations of ceasefire violations.

events.title: Israeli Fire Kills Seven, Including Two Children, in Gaza
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes and gunfire killed at least seven Palestinians, including two children, in the Gaza Strip. Health officials confirmed the casualties, while the Israeli military stated it struck militants.

events.title: Headteacher Among Four Killed in Deadliest Israeli Attack on Lebanon Since Ceasefire
events.desc: Four people, including a headteacher, were killed in an Israeli attack on southern Lebanon, described as the deadliest since the latest ceasefire. Three women and one man were reportedly traveling in a car when the attack occurred.

events.title: Bomb Blast at Damascus Cafe Kills Nine
events.desc: A bomb blast at a cafe in Damascus killed nine people. The cafe was located near the Palace of Justice, a significant government building. No group has claimed responsibility for the attack.

events.title: Fourteen Killed in Saudi Arabia Helicopter Crash
events.desc: A helicopter belonging to the Saudi state oil giant Aramco crashed, resulting in fourteen fatalities. The cause of the crash is currently under investigation.

events.title: US Strikes Iran After Attack on Cargo Ship
events.desc: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response. This follows US strikes after an attack on a cargo ship.

events.title: Russia Bans Diesel Exports Amid Ukrainian Drone Attacks
events.desc: Russia has implemented a ban on diesel exports to bolster its domestic fuel market, following persistent Ukrainian drone attacks on oil refineries that have caused shortages and price spikes.

events.title: Iran's Nuclear and Military Damage Revealed in Satellite Images
events.desc: Restricted satellite imagery has revealed damage to Iranian nuclear sites, ballistic missile infrastructure, and naval bases following recent strikes.

events.title: Trump Says Israel Will Withdraw Troops from Southern Lebanon
events.desc: US President Donald Trump expressed his belief that Israel would withdraw troops from southern Lebanon, stating he had discussed the matter with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and that a deal was in place.
